mission_title: Repair Bay V2.2 — Reliable Mission Console Transfer

argv: import sys;from pathlib import Path;root=Path(r'Z:\FOXAI');sys.path.insert(0,str(root));text=(root/'core'/'foxai_web.py').read_text(encoding='utf-8');markers=['REPAIR_BAY_MISSION_TRANSFER_V2_2_BROWSER_START','preparedRepairMission','storePreparedRepairMission','repairHandoffCalmOpenButton','Cancel Handoff','Already prepared — Open Mission Console','consumePreparedRepairMission','Prepared Engineer handoff cleared by Mission Console reset.'];assert all(m in text for m in markers),[m for m in markers if m not in text];block=text.split('REPAIR_BAY_MISSION_TRANSFER_V2_2_BROWSER_START',1)[1].split('REPAIR_BAY_MISSION_TRANSFER_V2_2_BROWSER_END',1)[0];assert block.index('finally{repairHandoffBusy=false')<block.index('if(success&&openConsole)openRepairHandoffInMission()');from core.repair_bay_diagnostics import run_repair_bay_scan;r=run_repair_bay_scan(root,mode='quick',context={'validation':'repair_bay_v2_2_live_transfer_smoke'});s=r.get('safety') or {};assert r.get('read_only') is True,r;assert s.get('network_used') is False,s;assert s.get('commands_run') is False,s;assert int(s.get('files_written') or 0)==0,s;assert int(s.get('repairs_applied') or 0)==0,s;print('REPAIR_BAY_V2_2_LIVE_TRANSFER_OK')
